message:
fix(sync,stream): remove baton-passing from Notify, check cancellation before initial WatchStream snapshot

Notify baton-passing removal (notify.rs):
- Remove the post-broadcast baton-passing logic from Notified::poll.
  When a waiter consumed a notify_one baton and a later broadcast
  covered the same waiter set, the old code forwarded the baton to
  post-broadcast waiters. This was incorrect: the baton was already
  consumed, and forwarding it caused spurious wakeups for waiters
  that arrived after the broadcast (they had no legitimate claim to
  the baton).
- Updated test: notify_one_lost_if_followed_by_broadcast_and_poll
  now asserts waiter C remains Pending (was incorrectly asserting
  Ready).

WatchStream initial snapshot cancellation (watch_stream.rs):
- Check cx.checkpoint() before yielding the initial snapshot. A
  pre-requested cancellation now terminates the stream immediately
  (returns None and sets terminated=true) instead of yielding one
  last value, which is consistent with the existing change-wait
  cancellation contract.
- Added test: watch_stream_new_none_is_terminal_after_cancel_before_
  initial_snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
